# freeswitch_operator (Data Source)

Look up an operator (Keycloak subject -> SIP extension binding) by subject.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_operator" "reception" {
  subject = "a1b2c3d4-0000-1111-2222-333344445555"
}

output "reception_extension" {
  value = data.freeswitch_operator.reception.number
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subject` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `number` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
